chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-241 of 2024 Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-242 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.09.2024 Mrs. Rehana Nazeer Gujjar, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Rameshan Oad, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh along-with SIP Karam Bakhsh Laghari PS Shahdadpur. == Through these applications applicant(s) challenged the orders dated 13.03.2024 wherein learned Magistrate while disagreeing with the report of Investigating Officer filed in ‘C’ Class converted the same into ‘B’ Class so also ordered to SHO concerned to initiate proceedings under section 182 PPC against complainant. At the very outset, learned counsel for applicant(s) submits that she would be satisfied if the impugned order may be modified thereby summary order may be approved from ‘B’ Class to ‘C’ Class as opined by the I.O such proposal has been conceded by learned APG. Under such circumstances, these applications are disposed of as not pressed. However, the impugned order dated 13.03.2024 of learned Magistrate is maintained with modification that summary report filed by investigating officer in ‘C’ Class is approved in ‘C’ Class instead of ‘B’ Class. JUDGE Muhammad Danish *
